name: Graphene NanoChem plc
summary: Graphene NanoChem plc, a graphene commercialization company, designs, formulates, manufactures, and markets intermediate and performance chemicals, and advanced nano-materials. It offers oilfield chemicals, such as drilling fluids and lubricants for oil and gas industry; and advance materials, including nanofluids, nanocomposites, and conductive inks. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.
